title: BJP vows two LPG cylinders per year, ₹3,000 pension in Kerala manifesto
description: The Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) on Tuesday promised two free LPG cylinders per year -- one each during Onam and Christmas -- for poor households, a Bhakshya-Arogya Suraksha card with a monthly recharge of ₹2,500 for women from poor and BPL households
